303 I4900_HEMIPLG_CD I4900_HEMIPLG_CD I4900 Active Diagnoses: Hemiplegia Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident had an active diagnosis of hemiplegia or hemiparesis in the last seven days. -=Not assessed/no information
